summary: Tested Celebrate Concierge® section on /celebrate-soul page including CelebrateConcierge CTA card, CelebrateServiceGrid (8 cards), ConciergeIntakeModal, and backend POST /api/concierge/intake endpoint. All core features work. One medium-priority bug found: service card pre-selection in modal not working.

ui_bugs.issue: When clicking a service card (e.g., Gotcha Day, Birthday), the modal opens but the corresponding celebration type option is NOT pre-selected. useState initializes only once on mount; prop changes don't update state.
ui_bugs.root_cause: ConciergeIntakeModal.jsx line 31: `const [selectedType, setSelectedType] = useState(serviceType || '');` — useState only runs once. When modal's serviceType prop changes (from different card clicks), state is not updated.
ui_bugs.fix: Add useEffect in ConciergeIntakeModal.jsx: `useEffect(() => { if (isOpen) { setSelectedType(serviceType || ''); } }, [isOpen, serviceType]);`

cta_card.title: ✓ 'Celebrate Mojo the way only you know how.'
cta_card.chips: ✓ Birthday Celebrations, Pawty Planning, Memory & Portraits, Milestone Marking, Surprise Deliveries

intake_modal.opens_on_cta: ✓ Modal opens when CTA button clicked
intake_modal.q2_date_picker: ✓ Date input + 'Not sure yet' toggle working
intake_modal.not_sure_toggle: ✓ Toggles date input disabled state correctly (both ways)
intake_modal.confirmation_screen: ✓ Shows 'Mojo's celebration is in good hands.' after submit
intake_modal.pre_selection_from_card: ✗ NOT working — service type not pre-selected when opened from card

service_grid.all_8_cards: ✓ BIRTHDAY, PHOTOSHOOT, CAKE, THE FULL DAY, GOTCHA DAY, SURPRISE, MILESTONE, VENUE
service_grid.illustrations: ✓ All 8 have watercolour illustrations from Cloudinary

page_layout.guided_paths_visible: ✓ 'Guided celebration paths' section visible below service grid

backend_tests.service_box_api: ✓ Returns celebrate pillar services with illustrations

action_items: FIX: ConciergeIntakeModal.jsx - Add useEffect to sync selectedType state when modal opens with new serviceType: `useEffect(() => { if (isOpen) { setSelectedType(serviceType || ''); } }, [isOpen, serviceType]);` This fixes pre-selection when clicking service cards.
critical_code_review_comments: ConciergeIntakeModal.jsx: useState(serviceType || '') initializes state only once on mount. Since the modal is always mounted (returns null if !isOpen), changing the serviceType prop between card clicks does not update the selected state. Fix: add useEffect syncing selectedType when isOpen/serviceType changes.

CelebrateServiceCard.jsx: The card wrapper div has onClick=onCta, but the inner button also exists with no onClick (it relies on parent div click). This is fine but could cause double-click issues. No bug, just note.

CelebrateServiceGrid.jsx: Grid uses hardcoded `gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(4, 1fr)'` for desktop. There is a `className='service-grid-responsive'` applied but no media query CSS for tablet/mobile in the component — responsiveness relies on external CSS class definition.
seed_data_creation: Several TEST_ concierge intake records created during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Celebrate Concierge section on /celebrate-soul is fully implemented and mostly working. One bug: ConciergeIntakeModal pre-selection doesn't work when opened from service cards (useState not syncing with prop). Fix is a one-line useEffect addition. All 8 backend tests pass. All 8 service cards render with illustrations. GuidedCelebrationPaths section is visible below the service grid.

rca_of_issue.bug: Service card pre-selection not working in ConciergeIntakeModal
rca_of_issue.reproduction: 1. Login, go to /celebrate-soul. 2. Scroll to 'Celebrate, Personally' grid. 3. Click any service card (e.g., 'Gotcha Day Celebration'). 4. Modal opens but none of the celebration type chips is highlighted/selected.
rca_of_issue.root_cause: ConciergeIntakeModal uses `useState(serviceType || '')`. The component is always mounted (returns null when !isOpen). On first mount, serviceType=''. When a card is clicked, serviceType prop changes but useState doesn't re-run. The modal shows with empty selection.
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Add `useEffect(() => { if (isOpen) { setSelectedType(serviceType || ''); } }, [isOpen, serviceType]);` in ConciergeIntakeModal.jsx after line 36.
